2: In the course of return leaders their were the Zorobabel, Jesus, Nehemiah, Seraias, Reelaiah, Mardochai, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum and Baanah. Follows list by kinships with the number of men of the people of Israel, who returned from the captivity:
70: people, nation, populace, crowd, public, folk, common people, common folk, common, populace, folk, people
